descFull: The context spine that 10x's every AI coding session. Live in 8 IDEs (Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Continue, Aider, Codex, Windsurf, Zed) via npm + OpenVSX + Anthropic plugin directory. 89% measured token reduction. Local SQLite, zero cloud, Apache 2.0.
